plugins.name: edloidas-plan
plugins.description: A Codex-safe planning bundle for issue drafting, scope analysis, and backlog triage.
plugins.shortDescription: Issue drafting, scope analysis, and backlog triage.
plugins.longDescription: Install the planning bundle from edloidas/skills for drafting GitHub issues, analyzing issue scope, and triaging the backlog from Codex.

plugins.name: edloidas-build
plugins.description: A Codex-safe build bundle for Git worktree management, merge-conflict resolution, and commit summaries.
plugins.shortDescription: Git worktrees, conflict resolution, and commit summaries.
plugins.longDescription: Install the build bundle from edloidas/skills for Git worktree management, semi-automatic merge-conflict resolution, and commit message summaries from Codex.

plugins.name: edloidas-review
plugins.description: A curated Codex-safe review bundle for changeset analysis, React analysis, PR feedback triage, and post-change cleanup.
plugins.shortDescription: Changes review, React review, triage, and cleanup.
plugins.longDescription: Install the Codex-ready review bundle from edloidas/skills for changeset review, React code review, review-comment triage, and post-implementation cleanup.

plugins.name: edloidas-audit
plugins.description: A Codex-safe audit bundle for skill quality, GitHub Actions, package scripts, and monorepo workspace configuration.
plugins.shortDescription: Audit skills, CI, scripts, and workspace setup.
plugins.longDescription: Install the audit bundle from edloidas/skills to inspect skill quality, CI workflows, package scripts, and pnpm workspace configuration from Codex.

plugins.name: edloidas-maintain
plugins.description: A Codex-safe maintenance bundle for label sync, instruction-file sync, lint migration, and comment quality audits.
plugins.shortDescription: Label sync, instruction sync, lint migration, and comment audits.
plugins.longDescription: Install the maintenance bundle from edloidas/skills for syncing GitHub labels, validating repo instruction files, migrating lint configs, and auditing code comments from Codex.

plugins.name: edloidas-ship
plugins.description: A Codex-safe shipping bundle for npm package releases and Railway deployment inspection.
plugins.shortDescription: npm releases and Railway deployment inspection.
plugins.longDescription: Install the shipping bundle from edloidas/skills for validating npm releases and inspecting Railway services, logs, and deployment status from Codex.

plugins.name: edloidas-assist
plugins.description: A Codex-ready assistance bundle for explanations, independent verification, and decision pressure-testing.
plugins.shortDescription: Explain concepts, verify claims, and challenge decisions.
plugins.longDescription: Install the assistance bundle from edloidas/skills for clear explanations, independent verification, and decision pressure-testing from Codex.

plugins.name: edloidas-obsidian
plugins.description: A Codex-ready helper for maintaining structured working documents in an Obsidian vault.
plugins.longDescription: Install the Obsidian working-docs helper from edloidas/skills to manage active task notes with a consistent vault structure.
